rationale: The implementation faithfully adheres to the v15 Task 4a specification without scope expansion. The closed inventory strictly enumerates package roots, docs, and required weaver topologies (AM-40/D31/D32). The shared closure derivation mechanism implements the required literal module-loading forms alongside a deterministic, profile-enforced lexer (AM-41). Counted-iterators guarantee executable accounting semantics (D26/D29), and the weavers correctly emit expected edges (introduced-by and depends-on) matching the schema matrices. Integration testing accurately asserts boundary semantics and the closure fixpoint.
